chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنِ ادَّعَى الْإِمَامَةَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ وَ مَنْ جَحَدَ الْأَئِمَّةَ أَوْ بَعْضَهُمْ وَ مَنْ أَثْبَتَ الْإِمَامَةَ لِمَنْ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 85 – The one who claims the Imamate and he is not rightful for it, and the one who denies the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, or some of them<sup>asws</sup>, and the one who affirms the Imamate for the one who is not rightful for it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور معتب ر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (194/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور معتب ر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (194/ 4)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ يَقُولُ إِنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ لَا يَدَّعِيهِ غَيْرُ صَاحِبِهِ إِلَّا بَتَرَ اللَّهُ عُمُرَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Sinan, from Yahya, a brother of Adeym, from Al Waleed Bin Sabeeh who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘This matter (Imamate) is such that anyone other than its (rightful) owner would not claim it except Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Cut-off his life’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Sinan from Yahya brother of ’daym from al-Walid ibn Subayh who has said the following. “I heard abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) say, “No one claims this matter (Leadership with Divine Authority) other than one who possesses Divine authority except that Allah will cut his life short.”
